use_cases: Digital signage for displaying scrolling announcements or messages
News tickers for breaking news or updates
Stock tickers for displaying financial information
Queue management systems for showing position numbers
Welcome messages for storefronts or event venues
ai_summary: A customizable LED-style dot-matrix scrolling text display component that renders characters using a pixel-based font pattern. Supports configurable scrolling speed, direction (left/right), dot color and size, optional borders, and pause-on-hover functionality. Creates a classic retro LED sign aesthetic with smooth animated text.
